title: Command Cockpit Node Signal Packets
summary: Added compact role-aware telemetry packets to selected Command Cockpit Quest nodes without increasing cockpit scroll.
changes: Derives World, Level, Checkpoint, Gate, and Next packet sets from reusable lane data.
Renders three tiny signal chips inside the Quest focus lens so clicked nodes expose status, pressure, and next-action context.
Compresses packet styling for desktop cockpit and mobile cockpit views so the board stays first-screen friendly.
